name: 3.0-NGC Lithium Conversion, 48v 105ah
description:
*PLEASE REVIEW THE ADD-ONS LISTED AT THE BOTTOM OF THE DESCRIPTION TO DECIDE IF ANY SUIT YOUR NEEDS OR PREFERENCES*


 your golf cart a glow-up with our NGC Lithium Conversion—faster, lighter, and way less drama!

Perks:

-Lighter Weight: Lithium batteries are significantly lighter, which can improve the handling and efficiency of the golf cart and, in some cases, increase take-off power and speed.

-Longer Lifespan: They typically last longer in terms of charge cycles, often up to 3-5 times more than lead-acid batteries.

-Faster Charging: Lithium batteries charge much quicker, reducing downtime.

-Holds Charge Longer: Lithium batteries generally hold their charge longer than lead-acid batteries in golf carts with a discharge rate of 1-3% per month compared to 5-15% for lead acid batteries.

 -Retention: Can hold a charge for up to 6-12 months without significant degradation if not in use.

-No Maintenance: They do not require watering or other maintenance tasks that lead-acid batteries need.

-Consistent Power: Lithium batteries provide consistent voltage throughout use; lead acids slow down as they lose their charge. 

-Environmentally Friendlier: With no lead or acid, disposal is less hazardous, and they're generally more recyclable.

Includes:
-51.2v 105ah LifePO4 lithium battery
-58.4v 14 amp on-board lithium battery charger
-200 amp continuous discharge BMS
-Digital SOC meter
-Complimentary phone holder
-Bluetooth connectivity 
-5 year manufacturer warranty
-90-day NGC workmanship warranty
-Professional installation 

LITHIUM BATTERY CONVERSION DISCLAIMER

Lithium battery conversions address battery-related performance and capacity issues only.

If the golf cart did not operate properly or did not run prior to the battery replacement, and the cause was believed to be battery-related, installation of a lithium battery does not guarantee that the cart will operate after the conversion.

Any pre-existing electrical, mechanical, or control system faults (including but not limited to wiring, solenoids, controllers, motors, key switches, or safety interlocks) may still prevent operation and are not included in the battery conversion service.

If the cart does not operate after the battery installation, separate diagnostic services may be required and will be billed independently of the conversion.

By approving the lithium battery conversion, you acknowledge and agree to these terms.


Add-ons (not included):

*Charger port w/ extension cord ($269)
    -If you would like to continue plugging the cart in to the charge port instead of hanging the charger power cord out from under the seat, you’ll need the charger port w/extension cord. 

*20 amp accessory voltage reducer ($225)
    -If you have accessories and they are currently wired straight to the batteries, you will need a voltage reducer. 

*12 volt accessory fuse box ($149)
    -If you’d like to protect all of your accessories with a fuse and organize accessory wiring, you’ll need the fuse box.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CORE CHARGE: A core charge of $20 per 6V or 8V battery and $30 per 12V battery will be added to the work order if original batteries are not returned. Return of original lead-acid batteries is required. This ensures environmentally responsible battery disposal. 

CAUTION: Lithium batteries may raise the vehicle's center of gravity, reducing stability and increasing the risk of tipping or rolling during sharp turns or on uneven terrain. Operate with care for safety.

name: 3.0-NGC Lithium Conversion, 36v 105ah
description:
*PLEASE REVIEW THE ADD-ONS LISTED AT THE BOTTOM OF THE DESCRIPTION TO DECIDE IF ANY SUIT YOUR NEEDS OR PREFERENCES*


Give your golf cart a glow-up with our NGC Lithium Conversion—faster, lighter, and way less drama!

Perks:

-Lighter Weight: Lithium batteries are significantly lighter, which can improve the handling and efficiency of the golf cart and, in some cases, increase take-off power and speed.

-Longer Lifespan: They typically last longer in terms of charge cycles, often up to 3-5 times more than lead-acid batteries.

-Faster Charging: Lithium batteries charge much quicker, reducing downtime.

-Holds Charge Longer: Lithium batteries generally hold their charge longer than lead-acid batteries in golf carts with a discharge rate of 1-3% per month compared to 5-15% for lead acid batteries.

 -Retention: Can hold a charge for up to 6-12 months without significant degradation if not in use.

-No Maintenance: They do not require watering or other maintenance tasks that lead-acid batteries need.

-Consistent Power: Lithium batteries provide consistent voltage throughout use; lead acids slow down as they lose their charge. 

-Environmentally Friendlier: With no lead or acid, disposal is less hazardous, and they're generally more recyclable.


Includes:
-36v 105ah LifePO4 lithium battery
-36v 14 amp on-board lithium battery charger
-200 amp continuous discharge BMS
-Digital SOC meter
-Complimentary phone holder
-Bluetooth connectivity 
-Professional installation 
-5 year manufacturer warranty
-90-day NGC workmanship warranty 

LITHIUM BATTERY CONVERSION DISCLAIMER

Lithium battery conversions address battery-related performance and capacity issues only.

If the golf cart did not operate properly or did not run prior to the battery replacement, and the cause was believed to be battery-related, installation of a lithium battery does not guarantee that the cart will operate after the conversion.

Any pre-existing electrical, mechanical, or control system faults (including but not limited to wiring, solenoids, controllers, motors, key switches, or safety interlocks) may still prevent operation and are not included in the battery conversion service.

If the cart does not operate after the battery installation, separate diagnostic services may be required and will be billed independently of the conversion.

By approving the lithium battery conversion, you acknowledge and agree to these terms.

Add-ons (not included):

*Charger port w/ extension cord ($269)
    -If you would like to continue plugging the cart in to the charge port instead of hanging the charger power cord out from under the seat, you’ll need the charger port w/extension cord. 

*20 amp accessory voltage reducer ($225)
    -If you have accessories and they are currently wired straight to the batteries, you will need a voltage reducer. 

*12 volt accessory fuse box ($149)
    -If you’d like to protect all of your accessories with a fuse and organize accessory wiring, you’ll need the fuse box.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CORE CHARGE: A core charge of $20 per 6V or 8V battery and $30 per 12V battery will be added to the work order if original batteries are not returned. Return of original lead-acid batteries is required. This ensures environmentally responsible battery disposal. 

CAUTION: Lithium batteries may raise the vehicle's center of gravity, reducing stability and increasing the risk of tipping or rolling during sharp turns or on uneven terrain. Operate with care for safety.

name: 1.0-Lithium Battery Winterization Service  (Disconnect or Reconnect)
description:
On-Site Lithium Golf Cart Battery Service Visit (Disconnect or Reconnect)

Protect your lithium-powered golf cart with expert on-site care from Neighborhood Golf Carts—no towing, no hassle, we come straight to you!

Our specialized Lithium Battery [Disconnect / Reconnect] Service ensures your pack stays healthy, balanced, and protected through the off-season (or wakes up perfectly in spring). Lithium batteries are low-maintenance champs with built-in BMS, but precise handling prevents minor issues like parasitic drain, cell imbalance, or cold-weather stress.

What We Do On-Site (Tailored to Your Visit):

- Full Battery Optimization — We monitor and bring your lithium pack to the ideal state of charge (80-100% for winter prep to maximize stored energy and enable BMS cell balancing; top-off to 100% for spring reactivation).
- Safe Power Management — Complete power-down of the cart, accessories, lights, and systems (set to TOW/storage mode if available) to eliminate any draws.
- Professional Battery Handling — Safely [disconnect / reconnect] the battery pack or use the isolation switch (negative cable protocol for safety), inspect/clean terminals and connections as needed, and confirm secure positioning.
- Quick Inspection & Verification — Check for any visible issues, ensure everything is winter-ready (or spring-operational), and provide tips for your storage setup.
- Test & Confirmation (especially on reconnect visits) — Includes a short test drive or systems check to verify smooth performance, no errors, proper function of lights/brakes/range, and that the BMS is happy.

This targeted visit keeps your lithium battery in top shape without unnecessary cycles or risks—perfect for seasonal prep or reactivation.

LITHIUM BATTERY CONVERSION DISCLAIMER

Lithium battery conversions address battery-related performance and capacity concerns only.

If the golf cart did not operate properly prior to conversion—or if the root cause was presumed to be battery-related—installation of a lithium battery does not guarantee the cart will operate after the conversion.

Pre-existing electrical, mechanical, or control system faults (including but not limited to wiring, solenoids/contactors, controllers, motors, key switches, sensors, or safety interlocks) may still prevent proper operation and are not included in the battery conversion service.

If the cart does not operate correctly after installation, separate diagnostic services may be required and will be billed independently of the conversion.

By approving the lithium battery conversion, you acknowledge and agree to these terms.

- Faster Charging: Lithium batteries charge much quicker, reducing downtime.

- Holds Charge Longer: Lithium batteries generally hold their charge longer than lead-acid batteries in golf carts with a discharge rate of 1-3% per month compared to 5-15% for lead acid batteries.

 - Retention: Can hold a charge for up to 6-12 months without significant degradation if not in use.

- No Maintenance: They do not require watering or other maintenance tasks that lead-acid batteries need.

- Consistent Power: Lithium batteries provide consistent voltage throughout use; lead acids slow down as they lose their charge. 

- Environmentally Friendlier: With no lead or acid, disposal is less hazardous, and they're generally more recyclable.
